en: A SONG OF ASCENTS. Blessed is everyone who fears the LORD, who walks in his ways!
zh: 敬畏耶和華，遵行他的道的人，是有福的。

en: You shall eat the fruit of the labor of your hands; you shall be blessed, and it shall be well with you.
zh: 你必吃你親手勞碌得來的， 你必享福，事事順利。

en: Your wife will be like a fruitful vine within your house; your children will be like olive shoots around your table.
zh: 你的妻子在你的內室， 好像多結果子的葡萄樹； 你的兒女環繞著你的桌子， 好像橄欖樹的枝條。

en: Behold, thus shall the man be blessed who fears the LORD.
zh: 看哪！敬畏耶和華的人 必這樣蒙福。

en: The LORD bless you from Zion! May you see the prosperity of Jerusalem all the days of your life!
zh: 願耶和華從錫安賜福給你； 願你一生一世得見耶路撒冷的繁榮。

en: May you see your children's children! Peace be upon Israel!
zh: 願你得見你兒女的兒女。 願平安歸於以色列。
